# 30-Day Plan to First Signal

## Goal

Find at least one repeatable signal: high-intent click, proof engagement, trial/lead, activation, qualified conversation, or paid conversion.

## Week 1

Demand map, proof assets, offer ladder, landing pages.

## Week 2

Search intent capture, competitor alternatives, retargeting proof, founder-led posts.

## Week 3

Kill weak hooks, strengthen offer, create new proof assets, test social demand creation, test outbound.

## Week 4

Compare by buyer state, identify strongest channel, create next 30-day plan, update memory.

If no signal appears in 30 days, produce a product/offer/channel diagnosis, not just more ads.
